prior_phase_status: P4 Dashboard and Calendar approved and committed
backend_confirmation: GET /api/billing/lines is the only verified JSON billing API.
GET /api/billing/lines requires query parameters named exactly from and to, both formatted YYYY-MM-DD.
GET /api/billing/lines returns from, to, rows, capacities, and count.
Each billing row contains vendor_id, vendor_name, booking_id, booked_date, generator_id, capacity_kva, and inventory_type.
GET /history exists only as an HTML page and requires read_only_operational_views.
No invoice, payment, or receipt API/model was verified.

objective: Fix the remaining Phase 5 review gaps without changing approved P1-P4 behavior.

behaviors: Do not modify auth restoration, bearer token attachment, logout, or router auth gating.
Do not modify generator inventory classification or permanent-generator exclusion.
Do not modify booking creation, retailer_out_of_stock handling, merge confirmation, bulk update minimum-item enforcement, cancellation, or delete flows.
Do not modify dashboard or calendar behavior.
Do not add invoice, payment, receipt, or fake history data.

validation: Invalid date format returns 400 with detail: Invalid date format (YYYY-MM-DD)
from later than to returns 400 with detail: "from" cannot be later than "to"

response_shape.capacities: array of integer capacity values present in rows

billing_api.repository_behavior: BookingRepository.list_billing_line_rows filters confirmed booking_items and confirmed bookings between from/to inclusive.

history_page.json_api_status: No JSON /api/history endpoint was verified. Do not scrape the HTML page and do not mock history data.

required_fixes.problem: Billing row cards render vendor_name, booked_date, generator_id, capacity_kva, and inventory_type, but do not render vendor_id or booking_id.
required_fixes.correct_behavior: Each billing row must visibly render vendor_id and booking_id as backend-provided fields, while preserving the existing tap navigation to /bookings/:id.

required_fixes.problem: The date picker prevents an immediate fetch when from > to, but the invalid date state remains and the refresh button can still submit the invalid range.
required_fixes.correct_behavior: Centralize client-side date-range validation so refresh and date changes never call GET /api/billing/lines when from is later than to. Show a clear user-facing error and do not present stale data as if it matched the invalid range.

required_fixes.problem: The backend guards GET /history with read_only_operational_views, but the mobile History entry/route is not capability-gated.
required_fixes.correct_behavior: Hide the History entry from More when read_only_operational_views is false, and make the History screen itself show an Access Denied state if directly navigated without that capability. Do not role-string compare.

optional_improvements: If useful, show both filtered row count and backend total count, but do not compute billing amounts client-side.
acceptance_criteria: Billing still calls GET /api/billing/lines with queryParameters {'from': yyyy-MM-dd, 'to': yyyy-MM-dd}.
Billing rows visibly show vendor_id, vendor_name, booking_id, booked_date, generator_id, capacity_kva, and inventory_type from backend data.
Tapping a billing row still navigates to /bookings/:booking_id.
No UI action submits GET /api/billing/lines when from is later than to.
The user sees a clear client-side date-range error instead of stale rows for an invalid range.
Billing remains gated by billing_access via PermissionService capability checks.
History visibility and direct route access are gated by read_only_operational_views via PermissionService capability checks.
History remains a backend-limited/unavailable state only; no mocked data, no HTML scraping, and no JSON history API invention.
No invoice, payment, or receipt UI is added.
P1/P2/P3/P4 files and behavior remain untouched.
